identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a rugged, high-contrast, industrial interface that prioritizes safety, clarity, and speed. Avoid the soft, rounded 'SaaS' look. Think 'Caterpillar' or 'DeWalt' meets modern digital design.
principles: Safety First: High contrast for outdoor readability.
Tactile Utility: UI elements should feel like physical switches and buttons.
Data Density: Managers need density; Operators need clarity.
Industrial Aesthetics: Use hazard stripes, stencil fonts, and raw textures.

headings.usage: All page titles, card headers, and major metrics.

mono.usage: Serial numbers, asset IDs, sensor readings, QR codes.

primary.description: Safety Yellow/Amber. Use for primary actions, active states, and focus rings.

secondary.description: Dark Grey/Gunmetal. Use for secondary buttons, dark mode surfaces.

usage_rules: CRITICAL: No gradients on buttons. Flat, high-visibility colors.
CRITICAL: Text on 'Safety Yellow' must be BLACK (#111827), not white.
Use 'Danger Red' sparingly only for critical failures or 'Do Not Operate' flags.

textures.name: Hazard Striping
textures.css: background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, #000 25%, transparent 25%, transparent 50%, #000 50%, #000 75%, transparent 75%, transparent); background-size: 10px 10px; opacity: 0.05;
textures.usage: Use as a subtle overlay on 'Danger' zones or inactive equipment cards.

textures.name: Subtle Noise
textures.css: background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
textures.usage: Apply to dark backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E5E7EB. On hover, darken to #9CA3AF. No soft shadows; use hard shadows if needed.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-none or shadow-sm. Avoid large diffuse shadows. We want a flat, technical look.

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default, but lean towards 'comfortable' (p-4, p-6) for desktop and 'touch-friendly' (p-4) for mobile.

grid_system.dashboard: Bento Grid: Mixed spans. Key metrics (4 cols), Recent Activity (2 cols), Map/Status (2 cols).

buttons.style: Rectangular, no rounded corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Uppercase text. Tracking-wide.

cards.style: Border-l-4 border-l-primary (accent strip). White background. Thin grey border elsewhere.
cards.header: Flex row, justified between. Heading in Barlow Condensed.

checklist_items.style: Large row. Text on left. Toggle/Status on right. clear separation lines.
checklist_items.interaction: Tap anywhere on the row to toggle. distinct 'Passed' (Green) vs 'Failed' (Red) states.

qr_display.style: High contrast. White background with clear black quiet zone. Centered.
qr_display.print_view: Minimal ink usage. Black and white only. Clear bold text for Asset ID.

hero_equipment.usage: Login screen background, Dashboard hero banner (dimmed).

dashboard.layout: Grid of 'Status Cards'. Top row: Total Machines, Due Maintenance (Red), Active Issues. Below: List of recent checklists.
dashboard.visuals: Use progress bars for 'Fleet Health'. Color code: Green (>90%), Yellow (70-90%), Red (<70%).

machine_detail.layout: Two column. Left: Image + Specs + QR. Right: Maintenance History + Checklist Log.
machine_detail.mobile: Stack. Image top. Big 'Start Checklist' button fixed at bottom.

qr_landing_public.layout: Mobile-first. Extremely simple. 1. Machine Name/Photo. 2. Status (Green/Red). 3. Button: 'Start Pre-start Check'.
qr_landing_public.note: No login required to VIEW basic status, but Login required to SUBMIT check.

checklist_form.layout: Stepper or long scroll. Group items by category (e.g., 'Fluids', 'Safety', 'Damage').
checklist_form.input: Yes/No/NA toggles. Photo upload button for 'Failed' items (require photo if failed).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts imports for Barlow Condensed and JetBrains Mono to index.css.
2. SETUP TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to use the 'Safety' color palette and fonts.
3. MOBILE FIRST: Design the Checklist and QR views for mobile screens (375px width) first.
4. PRINT STYLES: Add a '@media print' block to the CSS. Hide navbars/sidebars. Ensure QR codes print crisp black on white.
5. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all inputs and buttons (e.g., 'submit-checklist-btn', 'machine-card-123').
6. SHADCN: Use standard Shadcn components but override the rounded corners to be 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' for that industrial look.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'SaaS' rounded corners. Make it look tough.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Use glass-morphism effects ONLY for sticky headers, not for data cards.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
